commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the MiniMax music provider to request streaming hex responses, parse streamed/audio payloads into MP3 output, preserve JSON fallbacks, and add provider tests plus a changelog entry.

PR surface: Source +71, Tests +66, Docs +1. Total +138 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level review: current main still uses a direct MiniMax music POST with the provider timeout path, and the linked source PR supplies live MiniMax before/after proof. I did not rerun the paid MiniMax live scenario in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The automerge lane has a concrete mechanical repair: rebase, preserve current-main duration behavior, fix the timeout cap, remove the changelog edit, and re-run focused checks.

actions.reason: repair worker already active for this job path

target.title: fix(minimax): stream music generation responses
